text: "Imperial" is a Clan Alignment, and it is your Clan Alignment. If no other player has an Imperial Stronghold, you begin the game with the Imperial Favor. You may not buy Personalities with Clan discount if Imperial is their only Clan Alignment (this trait only has effect when using the Clan Discount optional rule).

(This card has +1PS and +2GP if you didn't go first.)

Tireless Battle: Discard a card to make a Fear effect with strength equal to the card's Focus Value. (Tireless actions may be taken even while bowed.)
title: Gates of the Second City

playtestname: The Fruitful Port of the Mantis (1st)

flavor: From the Island of Broken Waves, the Mantis ferry their cargos to all corners of the Empire, expanding their wealth with every turn.

title: The Fruitful Port of the Mantis
flavor: "Insult us with snide comments if you wish, but first consider… where did this food I eat come from?" - Yoritomo Hiromi
text:
Limited, (3): Draw a card.
(When going second, you may, once per game, Produce 2 Gold.)

title: The Fruitful Port of the Mantis
flavor: "My brother's temperament notwithstanding, the best way to ensure that we are not crossed is to ensure that no clan can afford to alienate our mercantile interests." - Yoritomo Harumi
text:
Limited, [3]: Draw a card.
(When going second, you may, once per game, produce 2 Gold)

title: The Fruitful Port of the Mantis
flavor: "Let the Empire look down upon commerce all they wish. When the Mantis can fund an army to defeat any foe, they will reconsider their ludicrous ideas." - Yoritomo Hiromi
text: Limited, (3): Draw a card.

Limited, :g3:: Draw a card.
(When going second, you may, once per game, produce 2 Gold)
formattedtitle: The Fruitful Port of the Mantis
title: The Fruitful Port of the Mantis

playtestname: The Shadowed Estate of the Scorpion (1st)

flavor: For many families, such a dreadful place would be an empty threat. With the Scorpion, it is a false comfort for their guests.

title: The Shadowed Estate of the Scorpion
flavor: "Underestimate us. Dismiss us. Insult us. Your anguish will be all the sweeter for it." - Bayushi Nitoshi
text:
Tireless Open: Name a Fate card, or name a Dynasty card in play. Negate the effects of the next action from a card with that title.
(This Stronghold has +1 Province Strength and other players have -1 Maximum Hand Size when going second)

flavor: "Welcome our guests. Provide all that they need. Learn everything you can. They will be ours." - Bayushi Nitoshi

flavor: What was once merely a watchtower has grown in size and scope. Now it truly stands watch over the Crab lands, like a sentry that never falters.

text:
Battle: Straighten your target opposed Personality. Straighten his attachments if your army has fewer units than the opposing army.
(When going second, you get +2PS and your Stronghold ability gains Tireless)
formattedtitle: The Unassailable Fortress of the Crab
title: The Unassailable Fortress of the Crab

flavor: The Crane excel at many things. One among them is the gift of finding beauty and exploiting it for political advantage.

title: The Esteemed Palace of the Crane
flavor: "It is unfortunate that the Mantis have chosen to force our hand in this matter. We will have no choice but to teach them a lesson." - Doji Makoto
text: Open, [bow]: If you control a Personality, gain 2 Honor.

Political Open, :bow:: If you control a Personality, gain 2 Honor.
(When going second, you get +1PS and a +5 Lobby bonus)
formattedtitle: The Esteemed Palace of the Crane
title: The Esteemed Palace of the Crane

flavor: Many think of the Dragon as being cold and impassive, like the mountains. But both have warmth and beauty undreamt of.

text:
After all players reveal Strongholds, search your Fate deck for a non-Void Ring, and put it into play; Sensei effects that remove abilities also remove this trait.
(When going second, you get +1PS, +1 maximum hand size, and begin with an extra card in your hand.)
formattedtitle: The Fortified Monastery of the Dragon
notes: This Stronghold may not be used in Twenty Festivals Extended formats.
title: The Fortified Monastery of the Dragon

playtestname: The Honorable Garrison of the Lion (1st)

flavor: The samurai of the Lion Clan do not press the issue that theirs is the greatest and most glorious army in the Empire. They assume that all others know and accept this. Only when it is called into question is the wrath of the Lion unleashed.

text:
Battle: Give your target opposed Samurai a Force bonus equal to his Personal Honor.
(When going second, you get +2PS and your Stronghold ability gains Tireless)
formattedtitle: The Grand Halls of the Lion
title: The Grand Halls of the Lion

playtestname: The Eternal Temple of the Phoenix (1st)

flavor: "There is no death or life in this world. We are but spirits who pass from one realm to the next before finding our ultimate home." - Phoenix teaching

text:
Dynasty, :g*:: Recruit your target dead (not discarded) Phoenix Clan Personality; you may Proclaim him. Gain 1 Honor.
(When going second, you get +1PS and Personalities you Proclaim enter play for two less Gold.)
formattedtitle: The Majestic Temple of the Phoenix
title: The Majestic Temple of the Phoenix

playtestname: The Sinister Citadel of the Spider (1st)

flavor: "A new Emperor will soon sit upon the throne, and we shall see what promises are kept and what promises are broken. The Empire should remember that they are not the only ones with promises to keep, however." - Daigotsu Kanpeki

text:
Tireless Battle: Fear 3. (Bow a target enemy Follower or Personality without Followers with 3 or lower Force)
(When going second, you have +1 Province Strength, your Fear has +1 strength, and you may, if any of your Provinces have been destroyed, refill the first Province during your Dynasty Phase face-up)
formattedtitle: The Hidden Bastion of the Spider
title: The Hidden Bastion of the Spider

playtestname: The Golden Plains of the Unicorn (1st)

flavor: "No one who threatens this place can be allowed to live. We stand to lose too much." - Shinjo Min-hee

text:
This Stronghold produces 4 Gold on your first turn.
Battle/Engage: If he would be opposed, move your target unbowed Personality in a Cavalry unit at any location to the current battlefield.
